word: G603 - ἀποκαραδοκία - apokaradokía - ap-ok-ar-ad-ok-ee'-ah - Earnest expectation

sections.paragraph:
- Original: ἀποκαραδοκία

- Transliteration: Apokaradokia

- Phonetic: ap-ok-ar-ad-ok-ee'-ah

- Definition:

1. anxious and persistent expectation

- Origin: from a comparative of G575 and a compound of kara (the head) and G1380 (in the sense of watching)

- TDNT entry: 07:33,7

- Part(s) of speech: Noun Feminine

- Strong's: From a compound of G575 and a compound of κάρα kara (the head) and G1380 (in the sense of watching); intense anticipation: - earnest expectation.
